name: Organic Baby Spinach (5 oz)
description: Tender, triple-washed organic baby spinach leaves ready to eat straight from the bag. Rich in iron, vitamins A and C, and antioxidants. Perfect for salads, smoothies, sautés, and pasta dishes.

reviews.title: Freshest spinach I've ever ordered online
reviews.reviewText: Arrived cold and crisp with no wilting. The leaves are small, tender, and incredibly flavourful. Will make this a weekly staple.

reviews.title: Smoothie game changer
reviews.reviewText: I throw two big handfuls into my morning smoothie every day. No bitterness, blends perfectly, and I love knowing it's organic.

reviews.title: Great quality, decent shelf life
reviews.reviewText: Very fresh on arrival. Lasted about 6 days in the fridge, which is what I expected. The resealable bag helps a lot.

reviews.title: Perfect for quick weeknight dinners
reviews.reviewText: I wilt these into pasta, add them to omelets, and use them in salads. So convenient having a clean, ready-to-use bag.

reviews.title: Good but a little pricey per oz
reviews.reviewText: Top quality spinach. I'd give it 5 stars but I do think the price per ounce is a bit high compared to in-store organic options. That said, the convenience makes it worth it for me.
